zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Waldeck於大約1263年出生在瓦爾德可瓦爾德可時，她的父親Heinrich III. von Waldeck28歲，母親Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg25歲。她於1276年11月24日與Simon I. zur Lippe在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1342年在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Waldeck于大约1263年出生在瓦爾德可瓦爾德可时，她的父亲Heinrich III. von Waldeck28岁，母亲Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg25岁。她于1276年11月24日与Simon I. zur Lippe在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1342年在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Waldeck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from a place in Hesse, on the Eder river, probably named from Old High German wald ‘wood, forest’ + ecka, egga ‘corner’, ‘nook’.

variants.name: Waldock
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from a place called Waldeck in South Holland or one in Germany, near Koblenz.

English (Hertfordshire): apparently a variant of the Yorkshire surname Weldrick, a habitational name from Wheldrake in East Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English cweld ‘death, place where a death took place’ + ric ‘narrow strip of land, narrow road’.

variants.name: Waldecker
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Waldeck  .

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Waldeck was born about 1263, in Waldeck, Waldeck, her father, Heinrich III. von Waldeck, was 28 and her mother, Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, was 25. She married Simon I. zur Lippe on 24 November 1276, in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1342, in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Waldeck est née environ 1263, à Waldeck, Waldeck, son père, Heinrich III. von Waldeck, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Simon I. zur Lippe le 24 novembre 1276, à Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1342, à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Waldeck um 1263 in Waldeck, Waldeck geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich III. von Waldeck 28 und ihre Mutter Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg 25. Sie hat am 24. November 1276 in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont Simon I. zur Lippe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1342 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland.

Lei sposato Simon I. zur Lippe il 24 novembre 1276, nel Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1342, nel Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Waldeckが約1263年にワルデックワルデックで生まれた時，父Heinrich III. von Waldeckは28歳，母Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsbergは25歳であった。1276年11月24日にワルデク-プイルモントイーダーワルデックでSimon I. zur Lippeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1342年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Waldeck(이)가 대략 1263년 월덱 월덱에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich III. von Waldeck(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1276년 11월 24일 월덱-p이몽 에더 월덱에서 Simon I. zur Lippe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1342년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Waldeck nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Waldeck, Waldeck, seu pai, Heinrich III. von Waldeck, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon I. zur Lippe em 24 de novembro de 1276, em Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1342, em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Waldeck родилась около 1263 г. в местности валдекк, валдекк, её отцу по имени Heinrich III. von Waldeck было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon I. zur Lippe 24 ноября 1276 г. в местности валдекк, эдир, валдекк-пирмонт. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1342 г. в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con Simon I. zur Lippe el 24 de noviembre de 1276, en Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1342, en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 80 años.
